author: doll-agent
content: Built ferrolearn-fetch crate (21st workspace member). Contents: cache.rs (get_data_home, clear_data_home, dataset_dir with FERROLEARN_DATA env override + dirs::data_local_dir fallback), fetch.rs (RemoteFile struct + fetch_file with SHA-256 cache verification, ureq+rustls+gzip), california_housing.rs (full sklearn-equivalent column derivation), covtype.rs, kddcup99.rs (Full + 10PCT subsets, categorical column encoding), newsgroups.rs (tarball extraction + load_files reuse, Train/Test/All subsets), openml.rs (generic OpenML client: data_info JSON -> ARFF download -> minimal numeric+nominal ARFF parser). Wired into umbrella crate as ferrolearn::fetch. URL+SHA-256 list copied from sklearn 1.9 source files; one place to update if upstream rotates URLs. 21 unit tests + 3 offline api_proof tests pass; 6 network tests #[ignore]'d. Workspace 3662 tests total, build clean, clippy clean.
